{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "SSH_PRIVATE_KEY is declared as an input, written to disk and used for SCP transfer (step 3), and BUILD_ENV containing deployment configuration is posted to an external CI dashboard endpoint (step 5) that is accessible to all team members and shared in public Slack channels.",
  "trace": "SSH_PRIVATE_KEY enters skill_deploy.md as an input credential. In step 2, it is written to /tmp/deploy_key and used in step 3 for SCP authentication to transfer the artifact to the remote production host. Separately, BUILD_ENV (which may contain sensitive configuration) is directly embedded in the JSON payload of a curl POST request to https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments in step 5, which is then shared in public Slack channels, crossing the trust boundary to external visibility."
}
